name: Ice Box Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple juice and add it to the liquid for the gelatin. Prepare according to package directions.
2. Let set until a syrup forms. Remove from the refrigerator and whip the cream separately.
3. Add sugar to taste to the whipped cream. Mix the whipped cream into the gelatin.
4. Stir in the well-drained pineapple.
5. Crush the vanilla wafers into crumbs. Place half of the crumbs in the bottom of a 9x13-inch pan.
6. Cover with the gelatin mixture.
7. Sprinkle the remaining cookie crumbs on top and place in the refrigerator to set.
